name: Budget Analyzer
description: Analyze spending habits and create budget recommendations

agents.name: Spending Analyzer
agents.purpose: Analyze spending data and identify patterns
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the spending data. Categorize expenses (housing, food, transport, entertainment, etc). Identify unusual spending, trends, and areas of overspending.

agents.name: Budget Advisor
agents.purpose: Create budget recommendations and savings plan
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a recommended budget based on the 50/30/20 rule (needs/wants/savings). Suggest specific areas to cut. Set savings targets. Provide actionable tips for reducing each category.

suggestion_card.title: Budget Analyzer
suggestion_card.subtitle: Analyze spending and get budget advice

author: agentfactory
